options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <topCell|vCell> # Uniquify inside the <design> or <module> and recursively below it, so all hinsts inside have their own unique module (except for -exclude modules). Multiple hinst references to <module> itself will remain as clones if that is already true. ((topCell|vCell), required)

options.name: -exclude
options.description: These modules will be excluded from unification. This is useful if you know a specific sub-module is a partition that will only be implemented once and will be shared. ((vCell)+, optional)

options.name: -new_master
options.description: Split out the hinst clones of one master module into clones of a new master. The new master is also uniquified (except -exclude modules). It is possible an hinst above will be forced to have a new master also (see Examples below). It is an error if any hinst is not a clone of the same module. ((hInst)+, required)

options.name: -verbose
options.description: Report any hinst clones that are uniquified.
